title: Solana JSON-RPC API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the Solana JSON-RPC 2.0 API covering accounts, tokens, transactions, blocks, cluster, and economics methods.

JsonRpcRequest.title: JSON-RPC 2.0 Request
JsonRpcRequest.description: A JSON-RPC 2.0 request envelope for Solana RPC methods.

id.description: Client-provided identifier echoed in the response

method.description: The Solana RPC method name to invoke

JsonRpcResponse.title: JSON-RPC 2.0 Response
JsonRpcResponse.description: A JSON-RPC 2.0 response envelope. Either 'result' or 'error' will be present, not both.

result.description: The result of the method call (present on success)

JsonRpcError.title: JSON-RPC Error
JsonRpcError.description: Error object returned when a JSON-RPC request fails.

code.description: Error code. Common codes: -32700 (Parse error), -32600 (Invalid Request), -32601 (Method not found), -32602 (Invalid params), -32603 (Internal error)

data.description: Additional error information specific to the error

Commitment.title: Commitment Level
Commitment.description: The level of commitment desired for the query. Higher commitment means more certainty but may be slower.

x-descriptions.finalized: The node will query the most recent block confirmed by supermajority of the cluster as having reached maximum lockout
x-descriptions.confirmed: The node will query the most recent block that has been voted on by supermajority of the cluster
x-descriptions.processed: The node will query its most recent block (may not be part of the cluster)

Encoding.title: Account Data Encoding
Encoding.description: Encoding format for account data fields.

Blockhash.title: Blockhash
Blockhash.description: A base58-encoded SHA-256 hash of a recent block used as a transaction nonce.

Lamports.title: Lamports
Lamports.description: An amount of SOL denominated in lamports. 1 SOL = 1,000,000,000 lamports.

Slot.title: Slot
Slot.description: A slot number in the Solana ledger. Slots are discrete time periods approximately 400ms apart.

Epoch.title: Epoch
Epoch.description: An epoch number representing a fixed period of approximately 2 days of slots.

UnixTimestamp.title: Unix Timestamp
UnixTimestamp.description: A Unix timestamp in seconds since the Unix epoch (January 1, 1970 UTC).

RpcContext.title: RPC Context
RpcContext.description: Contextual metadata included in many Solana RPC responses.

slot.description: The slot at which the operation was evaluated

AccountInfo.title: Account Info
AccountInfo.description: Account state and metadata for a Solana account.

lamports.description: Number of lamports assigned to this account

owner.description: The program that owns this account

data.description: Account data - either a two-element array [data, encoding] or a parsed object

executable.description: Whether this account contains a compiled program (is strictly read-only)

rentEpoch.description: The epoch at which this account will next owe rent

space.description: The data size of the account in bytes

TokenAmount.title: Token Amount
TokenAmount.description: SPL Token amount with both raw and UI representations.

amount.description: Raw token amount as a string (no decimal adjustment)

decimals.description: Number of decimal places configured for the token mint

uiAmount.description: Token amount as a float using mint-prescribed decimals (DEPRECATED, may be null)

uiAmountString.description: Token amount as a string using mint-prescribed decimals (preferred)

err.description: Error if transaction failed, null if it succeeded

fee.description: Fee in lamports charged for this transaction

preBalances.description: Account balances before the transaction was processed

postBalances.description: Account balances after the transaction was processed

innerInstructions.description: List of inner instructions emitted during transaction processing

preTokenBalances.description: Token balances of all token accounts before the transaction was processed

postTokenBalances.description: Token balances of all token accounts after the transaction was processed

logMessages.description: Log messages from transaction instruction execution

computeUnitsConsumed.description: Total number of compute units consumed during transaction processing

loadedAddresses.description: Addresses loaded from address lookup tables

returnData.description: Return data set during transaction processing by the last instruction

TransactionTokenBalance.title: Transaction Token Balance
TransactionTokenBalance.description: Token balance snapshot associated with a transaction.

accountIndex.description: Index of the account in the transaction's account list

mint.description: Public key of the token mint

owner.description: Public key of the token account owner

programId.description: Public key of the token program that owns the account

SignatureStatus.title: Signature Status
SignatureStatus.description: Confirmation status of a transaction signature.

slot.description: The slot the transaction was processed in

confirmations.description: Number of blocks since signature confirmation; null if the block is rooted

err.description: Error if transaction failed, null if it succeeded

VoteAccount.title: Vote Account
VoteAccount.description: Information about a validator's voting account and stake.

activatedStake.description: Stake delegated to this vote account, in lamports

epochVoteAccount.description: Whether the vote account is staked for this epoch

commission.description: Percentage (0-100) of rewards payout owed to the vote account

lastVote.description: Most recent slot voted on by this vote account

epochCredits.description: History of epoch credits: [epoch, credits, previousCredits]

rootSlot.description: Current root slot for this vote account

ClusterNode.title: Cluster Node
ClusterNode.description: Information about a node participating in the Solana cluster.

tpu.description: TPU network address for submitting transactions (host:port)

rpc.description: JSON-RPC network address (host:port or null if not enabled)

featureSet.description: Unique identifier of the node's feature set

shredVersion.description: The shred version the node has been configured to use

EpochInfo.title: Epoch Info
EpochInfo.description: Information about the current epoch and slot.

slotIndex.description: Current slot index within the current epoch

slotsInEpoch.description: Number of slots in the current epoch

transactionCount.description: Total number of transactions processed without error since genesis

InflationGovernor.title: Inflation Governor
InflationGovernor.description: Inflation schedule parameters for the Solana network.

taper.description: Rate per year at which inflation is lowered until terminal

foundation.description: Percentage of total inflation allocated to the foundation

foundationTerm.description: Duration of foundation pool inflation in years
